programme.desc: A work-place comedy about 'TnT In The Morning,' a Christian morning radio show team on KHUGG-FM. The fake show plays out in real-time with real celebrity guests and hilarious behind the scenes drama.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and step families make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So for Steven, entering a relationship with Rachel and her three children required a little patience.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth confronts an imposing figure from her past with Nathan's support. Rosemary helps Lee navigate a new leadership role. Lucas struggles to find bidders for his resort project.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Teen Justin has worked tirelessly to save nearly 80 acres in the Rainforests of Ecuador, home to many species of frogs. Lacey and her team are throwing him Rainforest Celebration to honour his efforts.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Join Tim as he travels up to Rochester, NY to witness stunt performer John Morgan's thrilling stunt work and how he is using his talents to shine light on the Good News of Christ.

programme.title: The Adventures of Skippy
programme.desc: Thelma's prejudice is revealed after the Habitat has a visiting Japanese girl stay with them.

programme.title: We of the Never Never
programme.desc: A woman travels to Australia in 1900 to live with her husband at an outback ranch. She struggles to adapt to the harsh climate and severe loneliness, being the only white woman around.

programme.title: Paperback Hero
programme.desc: A road-train driver becomes a romance novelist with the pen name Ruby. When a glamorous publisher wants to sign Ruby to a book deal, the charade gets comical.

programme.title: Lover Boy
programme.desc: Explores the conflicting worlds of a teenager and a mature woman as they discover the full force of their sexuality.

programme.title: Kane
programme.desc: Benny works for Abe, a crime boss, and is caught in an escalating Queensland gang war. Things are complicated as Abe has multiple personalities and Benny must confront the deadliest persona - Kane.

programme.title: Puberty Blues
programme.desc: Two teenage girls fall into a demeaning life of drugs and sex to serve a gang of surfies in this beach-culture classic.

programme.title: The Adventures of Skippy
programme.desc: Everyone's excited that Skippy and the preserve are chosen for a TV commercial. Jerry and Lou learn about actress Brooke's unhappiness. The kids sabotage filming.

programme.title: Breaker Morant
programme.desc: The Bushveldt Carbineers, made up mainly of Australians, is ordered by the British to the fight the Boer on its terms.

programme.title: Breaker Morant: The Retrial
programme.desc: We tell the whole Breaker story from bush balladeer to Bushveldt Carbineers, and convicted war criminal, and reveal the his real motivations for joining the major Australian Expeditionary force.

programme.title: Stir
programme.desc: Tensions between guards and inmates at an Australian prison reach a boiling point, culminating in a bloody riot.

programme.title: Blue Fin
programme.desc: After their fishing trip goes awry, leaving the crew shipwrecked, a young boy holds the key to save everyone from disaster.

programme.title: Warm Nights on a Slow Moving Train
programme.desc: A Melbourne teacher commutes to Sydney, changes her looks and seduces men for money on a return train.

programme.title: Space/Time
programme.desc: After a deadly accident ends their funding, a team of scientists turns to crime to rebuild their interstellar engine and finish their groundbreaking work.

programme.title: The Empty Beach
programme.desc: A rich woman wants an Australian private eye (Bryan Brown) to find out if her tycoon husband is still alive.

programme.title: Paper Champions

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: The love affair between poet Percy Shelley and 18-year-old Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, which resulted in Mary Shelley writing Frankenstein.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: Charles Darwin struggles to find a balance between his ideas of evolution and his relationship with his devout wife.

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: An archaeologist and an architect fight to reimagine a future after a traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Jack comes to Amsterdam to find his father and, through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: The love affair between poet Percy Shelley and 18-year-old Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, which resulted in Mary Shelley writing Frankenstein.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: An acclaimed account of the great British painter who was a radical and revolutionary artist.

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: An archaeologist and an architect fight to reimagine a future after a traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: James Murray begins compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, receiving over 10,000 entries from an asylum patient.

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Jack comes to Amsterdam to find his father and, through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: The mixed-race daughter, Dido Elizabeth Belle, of Royal Navy Captain Sir John Lindsay is raised by aristocratic Great-uncle Lord William Murray, 1st Earl of Mansfield in eighteenth century England.

programme.title: Elstree 1976
programme.desc: Actors and extras reminisce about their time on the set of Star Wars (1977) and how making the film affected their lives.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: One of the 20th century's most influential women, Margaret Thatcher smashed through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On March 13, 1996, one of the most devastating crimes to hit the UK happened in Dunblane, Scotland. A lone gunman, Thomas Hamilton, entered Dunblane Primary School, shooting at pupils and staff.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On August 22, 2007, 11-year-old Rhys Jones was shot and killed while walking home from football practice in Croxteth, Liverpool.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In April 1999, London became the scene of three horrific bomb attacks when David Copeland planted homemade devices in Brixton, Brick Lane, and Soho.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On April 26, 1999, Jill Dando was brutally murdered on her doorstep in Fulham, London. We examine the evidence and delve into one of the UK's biggest crimes that still remains unsolved.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Reveals how the deadliest crimes are solved by the only witnesses that never lie, and where murderers have no place to hide: surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Reveals how the deadliest crimes are solved by the only witnesses that never lie, and where murderers have no place to hide: surveillance cameras.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: In 2009, Dalia Dippolito was just another trophy wife on the path to Palm Beach high society. That is, until police broke the news that she'd become a trophy widow.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: In 2004, the grisly murder of automotive executive Bob Seaman would unveil a startling confession and a groundbreaking trial that would divide a family - and a city - for years to come.

programme.title: My Lover, My Killer
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh's final attempt to escape Janbaz Tarin's control results in a double murder, despite her calls for help.

programme.title: O.J. Simpson: Blood, Lies & Murder
programme.desc: Lange, Kato Kaelin, and Allan Park discuss the night of the murders, with Lange and Englert examining autopsy results and a new experiment recreating Ron Goldman's fight with the attacker.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A look at the potential consequences when a romance causes people to commit unthinkable criminal acts in the name of love.

programme.title: Texas Cheerleader Murder Plot
programme.desc: Why did Wanda Holloway, the mother of a high-school cheerleader, conspire to have another cheerleader and her mother murdered? This series explores the limits of how far controlling parents can go.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests John Rambo, he must make a daring escape and prepare himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: A Special Operations veteran is now into peace, serenity and non-violence. But when Trautman is held by the Soviets and interrogated, the CIA can do nothing and Rambo must come to his aid.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.desc: In this third instalment of the great adventure saga, Indy is on a treacherous quest for the Holy Grail, complicated by a sexy woman with a fatal flaw: she's a Nazi agent.

programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: In 2014, Bitcoins worth 470 million USD vanished from an exchange in Tokyo. Where did they go? We delve into the growing intersection of crime and state interests in the crypto world.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Train Cruise

programme.desc: Women-only trips and solo camping are some of the many ways that people enjoy camping in Japan. Camping can even serve as a method of preparing for disaster. We examine its increasing popularity.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Designing for portability. The spotlight is on portable and mobile designs. From lighting to houses and transport, explore the appeal and potential of designing for portability.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese
programme.desc: This program presents masterpieces of classical Japanese literature in both their original forms and modern translations, with easy-to-understand imagery that conveys the worldview of ancient Japan.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose
programme.desc: This program employs "mitateru," a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: Samurai Wisdom
programme.desc: In one generation, Mori Motonari rose from a minor lord to ruler of most of western Japan despite bitter betrayal. His wisdom still echoes today.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Daniel Moore takes a cinematic journey through Nagano. In springtime he hits the south, experiencing the breathtaking cherry blossoms, and in winter gets lost in magical winter landscapes up north.

programme.desc: Kikuchi Atsuki (Graphic designer) is drawn to enamelware that reflects the creators' own instincts. He talks about the appeal of designs made and used by the same person.

programme.desc: NEWS 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: It's not all monkey business in the villages of Zanzibar Island. The local red colobuses have serious health issues. But they've adapted quite well with an unappetizing addition to their daily diet.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Tokachi is in Japan's great northern land of Hokkaido, home to vast fields and sprawling pastures. Experience its vibrant summer colors through time-lapse photography.

programme.desc: Hiraoka Kasumi is in the international spotlight after winning an award at the Vertical Movie Festival 2025. She talks about combining social commentary with fantasy-inspired storytelling.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to mud. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #20 Please don't put wasabi in. / To ask someone not to put something in your food or drink, say the name of the item, the particle "wa," and finally "irenaide kudasai."

programme.desc: Today's biggest hits blended with the classics you love.

programme.title: Moon Dance
programme.desc: A breezy blend of feel-good vibes and irresistible grooves.

programme.title: Sunrise Set
programme.desc: Feel-good favourites to start your morning right.

programme.title: Hits & Feels
programme.desc: A steady wave of feel-good anthems!

programme.title: Totally Timeless
programme.desc: The ultimate mix of guitar-driven anthems and singalong favourites. From soaring choruses to easy rock staples, these are the tracks that never go out of style.

programme.title: Millennial Mixtape
programme.desc: 2000s favourites that shaped a generation.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. Falling for her, he suspects something sinister is going on.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Puppet Master II
programme.desc: The malicious marionettes are back to resurrect their dead master and evict parapsychologists from the family estate.

programme.title: Puppet Master III: Toulon's Revenge
programme.desc: Gestapo agents face killer dolls when they murder puppeteer Toulon's wife in this prequel to "Puppet Master".

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: In this light-hearted yet violent cosmic, comedy adventure, an intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: Dust Devil
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: A meth cook hunts down the former police chief in order to silence him before he can deliver eyewitness testimony against his family.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi
programme.desc: Trace Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls' redemptive journey from notorious flop to cult classic, and maybe even masterpiece.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes in a half-shell are back. Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: When pregnant Ellie returns to her childhood home to complete a book, she's reunited with her mother. Consumed by dark memories of the house, she ends up unearthing a horrifying reality.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning...and murder.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Puppet Master II
programme.desc: The malicious marionettes are back to resurrect their dead master and evict parapsychologists from the family estate.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-man's-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.desc: Officers from Home Affairs, Border Force and Quarantine enforce immigration, customs, quarantine and finance laws at Australia's borders.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger leads Jamie's militia to the trading post of Brownsville and finds himself in a feud. Jamie and Claire arrive to find that Roger's unusual strategy may have cost them the loyalty of the militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and his militia arrive at Hillsborough to learn that Governor Tryon has proposed a rather unorthodox solution to deal with the threat posed by the Regulators and to resolve the political crisis.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: At Jocasta's wedding, Jamie learns Tryon's true motivation for ending the Regulator threat.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Regulator Rebellion reaches a boiling point, forcing Jamie to face his fear and confront the consequence of his divided loyalties.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Frasers must come to terms with all that has changed in the aftermath of the Battle of Alamance Creek. Brianna tries to help Roger overcome the trauma he has endured.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: When Jamie is bitten by a venomous snake, Claire fears she may not have the resources to save him. Jamie asks Roger to complete an important task in the event of his death.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Roger implement their plan to eliminate the threat looming over them, but it goes awry. Brianna is forced to confront her greatest fear and fight for her and her son's lives.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A revelation about Jemmy forces Roger and Brianna to choose between staying in the 18th century, or returning to the safety of the future.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire struggles to survive brutal treatment from her captors, as Jamie gathers a group of loyal men to help him rescue his wife. Roger and Brianna's journey takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's authority is tested when an old rival from Ardsmuir shows up to settle on the Ridge. Meanwhile, Claire finds a new way to cope with the trauma of her assault by Lionel Brown.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie struggles with his first request as an agent. Meanwhile, Roger presides over an unusual funeral, and Marsali gives birth.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Fergus worries about his new son's quality of life when the baby is bullied by superstitious Protestants. Claire performs surgery on Tom's hand.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While visiting the Cherokee, Ian encounters a man from his past who dredges up painful memories of his time with the Mohawk. Jamie meets an agent who challenges his convictions.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie experience the rising tensions in the colonies when they attend a Loyalist event in Wilmington in honour of the Scottish heroine Flora MacDonald.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A dysentery epidemic spreads on the Ridge, and Claire falls deathly ill. She is almost recovered when the Christies arrive and drop a bombshell.

programme.desc: Team captains Jonathan Ross and Richard Ayoade are joined by Maisie Adam, Kemah Bob and Sarah Keyworth.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are Jo Brand, Emma Bunton, Jonnie Peacock and Shaun Williamson.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack, and David Mitchell return for an episode of previously unseen material from the hit comedy panel show.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The lives of elderly eccentrics William and Mary Bingham come under police scrutiny when a social services investigator is murdered.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Julian Shepherd is found drowned and it seems he committed suicide. When another man dies after trying to steal peregrine eggs from a man connected to the first death, Barnaby suspects foul play.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are? UK
programme.desc: Ross Kemp's ancestral detective hunt leads to a marine drummer boy from the Napoleonic era and his great-grandfather's experiences in the merchant navy during two world wars.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Flambeau is stunned to find his estranged father at St Mary's, who has a dangerous mission in mind. Flambeau is summoned to St Mary's by a funeral announcement for his father.

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Budding entrepreneurs pitch a figure-skating clothing brand, a vacuum attachment to combat dust from drilling, a coffee company and a volunteering app.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby gets trapped in a fallen canal tunnel, and in getting her out, several skeletons come to light; two local tearaways are shot dead in the woods at Midsomer Worthy.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry looks into a jumble of things that start with the letter J. Guests this episode are Jo Brand, John Sessions, Dara O Briain, and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are guests Alan Davies, Richard Osman, Professor Germaine Greer and Jermaine Jenas.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Penny and Vinny have their first baby scan, Zoe tries to build bridges, and Zack faces financial problems.

programme.title: EastEnders
